title: Fiery Smoky Mexican Fish Tacos
description: Savory and tender fish tacos with a smoky flavor, featuring wholegrain mustard and tandoor spices, perfect for a midnight craving. This pescatarian-friendly dish is a twist on traditional Mexican cuisine from the Chiapas region.
instructions: Preheat the grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together wholegrain mustard, tandoor spice blend, and lime juice.
Brush the cod fillets with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the cod fillets for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of grilled cod on each tortilla, followed by a slice of red onion and a sprinkle of cilantro.
Drizzle the mustard-tandoor sauce over the top of each taco.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges, if desired.
